description: Enhance the security of the 'SecureNotes' app by migrating the 'TokenManager' class from standard SharedPreferences to Jetpack Security's EncryptedSharedPreferences. Update the app-level build.gradle.kts with the 'androidx.security:security-crypto' dependency (version 1.0.0 or higher). Refactor 'app/src/main/java/com/example/securenotes/data/TokenManager.kt' to initialize 'EncryptedSharedPreferences' using a MasterKey and the filename 'secure_app_prefs', employing 'AES256_SIV' for key encryption and 'AES256_GCM' for value encryption. Ensure the migration is successful by passing the 'TokenManagerTest' unit tests.
